productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Eva Black Casual Shoes
description: These high-top rustic shoes from buckaroo blend vintage cowboy styling with a contemporary minimal twist. Referenced from the classic monk strap style, these shoes with a leather inner give off a subtly stylish vibe. Style this pair with denim or corduroy trousers and a casual check shirt. Alternatively, you can wear this with chinos and a crisp shirt. UpperHigh-top leather grain upper with strategically placed overlay on the heelBranding embossed on the lateral side of the midfootA strap across the toe box and a strap with velcro closure along the lateral side of the ankleZippered closure on the other side of the anklePadded tongueSoft insole for in-step comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heelStitch detailing on the seams of the toe boxMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with a curved midfoot and upraised heel with patterned groovesshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
